LanguageData.Military_Gizmo_AssignPatrolDesc: Select a colonist to assign a patrol route
LanguageData.Military_WaypointBegin: Select 4 waypoints for the patrol route. Right-click to finish early or cancel.
LanguageData.Military_WaypointSet: Waypoint {0} set. Click to place next, or right-click to finalize.
LanguageData.Military_EligibleText: {0} has enough combat experience to be promoted to {1}. Consider promoting them in the Military tab.
LanguageData.Military_Patrol_NoWaypointsTip: No patrol route set (need at least 2 waypoints)
LanguageData.Military_AssignBodyguardDesc: Order this pawn to guard a target pawn.
LanguageData.Military_AssignDefendAreaDesc: Select a military pawn, then click two corners to define a defend area.
LanguageData.Military_StopDefendingDesc: Cancel this pawn's defend area assignment.
LanguageData.Military_DefendAreaBegin: Click the first corner of the defend area.
LanguageData.Military_DefendAreaCorner1: First corner set. Click the second corner to complete the area.
LanguageData.Military_DefendAreaAssigned: {0} has been assigned a defend area.
LanguageData.Military_Scenario_PhantomStrike_Desc: Four elite black-ops soldiers. Their unit was wiped out. Now they are drop-podded deep behind enemy lines with one order: survive and dominate.
LanguageData.Military_Scenario_PhantomStrike_StartMes: Your strike team has landed. Four operators, no support, no extraction.\n\nAssign bodyguards, set patrol routes, and build your squad into an unstoppable force. Promotions come fast - earn them.
LanguageData.Military_Mission01_StartText:
Three weeks since you went dark. Four operators, no extraction, no support network. You thought you had shaken them. You were wrong.

Helix Corporation's Erasure Division has triangulated your drop pod signature. A full eraser team is converging on your position right now. Prepare for contact.

Eliminate every last one of them. Lose a single operator and it is over.
LanguageData.Military_Mission01_SuccessText:
The Helix advance team has been eliminated. The landing zone is clear.

An automated supply cache has been airdropped to your position:
- 300 wood
- 200 steel
- 10 components
- 10 medicine

Build fast. Helix will not stay quiet for long.

Stand by. New intelligence incoming.
LanguageData.Military_Mission01_FailText: An operator was lost. Helix accomplished their objective. The Phantom Strike Force is gone.\n\nHelix Corporation considers this matter closed.
LanguageData.Military_M1_BurnedText: They tracked your drop pod signature. Helix Corporation Erasure Division is moving on your position right now. This is what they do — they find, they fix, and they finish. Take cover and prepare to engage. Every second counts.
LanguageData.Military_HelixCorp_Desc: The Erasure Division. They do not negotiate. They do not retreat. They erase.
LanguageData.Military_HelixCorp_RaidText: A Helix Corporation Eraser team has been dispatched to your coordinates. These are not raiders. These are professionals sent to terminate your operation. Prepare for a coordinated assault.
LanguageData.Military_Mission02_StartText:
A figure approaches your position. He is calm. Well-dressed. Unhurried.

His name is Silas Vane — a senior intelligence officer who walked away from Helix Corporation three days ago and took their most sensitive data with him. He has come to you because you are the only asset he trusts.

Vane is not injured. He does not need saving. He needs time. Keep him alive on your map for 7 days while his extraction is arranged. Helix knows he is coming here. They will send people.

Reward: 1000 silver on successful extraction.
LanguageData.Military_Mission02_SuccessText:
Silas Vane said his farewells quietly, like a man who has done this before. He thanked your operators by name, adjusted his coat, and walked off the edge of your map without looking back.

The intelligence he carried is now out of Helix's reach. Reward delivered. Mission complete.

Helix Corporation will not forget what you did here.
LanguageData.Military_Mission02_FailText: Silas Vane is dead. The intelligence files are gone. Helix Corporation will assume you were responsible.\n\nThey will not send another eraser team. They will send everything they have.
LanguageData.Military_M2_RaidText: Helix Corporation has confirmed Silas Vane's location. They are not sending scouts this time.\n\nAn Erasure team has been deployed — purpose-built to terminate high-value targets in defended positions. Protect Vane at all costs. Do not let them reach him.
LanguageData.Military_TrainCombat_Desc: Designate this dummy for both melee and ranged training.
LanguageData.Military_TrainMelee_Desc: Designate this dummy for melee training only.
LanguageData.Military_TrainRanged_Desc: Designate this dummy for ranged training only.
LanguageData.Military_TrainCancel_Desc: Remove training designation from this dummy.
LanguageData.Military_Mission03_StartText:
Silas Vane's data files have been decoded. They contain the coordinates of Helix Corporation's forward operating base in your sector — the staging point for every eraser team they have sent against you.

Command has authorized a counter-strike posture. An arms dealer — one of Vane's old associates — is en route with weapons, armor, medicine, and recruitable personnel. He will arrive within the day. Use your silver wisely.

But Helix has intercepted the same transmission. They know you have the data. They are not going to wait.

Prepare for a full-scale assault. Eliminate the Helix Commander to break their grip on this sector.
LanguageData.Military_Mission03_SuccessText:
Director Kael Voss is dead. The Helix Commander's body lies in the dirt alongside the wreckage of his assault force.

Their forward operating base has gone dark. No reinforcements are coming. No eraser teams. No more midnight raids.

For the first time since you landed, the sky is quiet. You are no longer prey.

Reward delivered:
- 2,000 silver
- 500 steel
- 30 components
- 20 glitterworld medicine

The Phantom Strike Force has won.
LanguageData.Military_Mission03_FailText: Your entire force has been wiped out. The Phantom Strike Force no longer exists.\n\nHelix Corporation considers the matter permanently resolved. Director Voss will receive a commendation.
LanguageData.Military_M3_TraderText:
One of Silas Vane's old contacts has arrived — a freelance arms dealer with connections to every black market in the sector.

He is carrying military-grade weapons, armor, medicine, combat drugs, and recruitable personnel. He accepts silver.

Spend wisely. This is the last resupply before the storm hits.
LanguageData.Military_M3_Wave1Text: Forward sensors detect movement on the perimeter. A Helix scout team has been deployed to probe your defenses. They are testing you.\n\nThis is not the main assault. But it is coming.
LanguageData.Military_M3_Wave2Text: The scouts reported back. Helix Corporation is no longer probing. A full assault force is advancing on your position — heavily armed, heavily armored, and moving fast.\n\nThis is not the final wave. The Commander is watching. Waiting.
LanguageData.Military_M3_Wave3Text:
Director Kael Voss has taken the field personally. The Helix Commander is leading the final assault wave — the largest force they have ever deployed against you.

He is wearing power armor. He is carrying their best weapons. And he has a direct mandate from Helix Corporate to end this.

Kill the Commander and the offensive collapses. Fail, and everything you have built dies with you.
